awesomeList.descriptionHTML: A curated list of awesome projects and resources related to the Substrate blockchain development framework.
awesomeList.description: A curated list of awesome projects and resources related to the Substrate blockchain development framework.

nodes.itemHTML: • polkadot-runtime-prom-exporter - A Prometheus exporter for Polkadot runtime metrics (modifable for substrate use).
• OnFinality - Free and public API services to shared Substrate based archival nodes.
• Chainlink Feed Palletstars85 - Chainlink feed pallet and example node showing how to integrate to Substrate chains.
• SubQuery - A GraphQL indexer and query service that allows users to easily create indexed data sources and host them online for free.
• React-Native-Substrate-Signstars14 -
• Substrate .NET Standard APIstars13 in nuget, and Unity 3D integration examplestars1 - Maintained by DOTMog.
• subsee - CLI to inspect metadata of a substrate node as JSON.
• PolkaView - Historical data on minimum staked to be rewarded.

• Polkadot Tool Index - Here is a very useful list of tools available for your development w/ Polkadot and any substrate chain including Block Explorers, Wallets, Network Monitoring & Reporting, Clients, Benchmarking, Fuzzing, Forking, SCALE Codec, CLI Tools and much more.
• Kotlin Substrate Clientstars8 - Maintained by Nodle.io
• Gossamerstars228 - A Polkadot client implemented in Go; from ChainSafe.
• Substrate: A Rustic Vision for Polkadot by Gavin Wood at Web3 Summit 2018
• Introduction to Substrate
• FRAME's Origin Primitive
• Governance with FRAME
• Polkadot Decoded Community Conference
• substrate-stencil - A template for a Substrate node that includes staking and governance capabilities.
• substrate-society - A basic front-end for the FRAME Society pallet.
• Substrate Graphstars16 - GraphQL indexer for Substrate-based chains.
• Aleph.im - Scalable, decentralized database, file storage, and computation services for Substrate chains and more.
• polkadot-launch - Simple CLI tool to launch a local Polkadot test network.
• substrate-js-utils - A set of useful JavaScript utilities for Substrate that uses the Polkadot{JS} API. Also deployed as a website.
• substrate-graph-benchmarks - Graph the benchmark output of FRAME pallets.
• substrate-balance-calculator - Breakdown the balances of your Substrate account.
• substrate-balance-graph - Create a graph of the token balance over time of a Substrate address.
• polkadot-js-bundle - A standalone JS bundle that contains Polkadot{JS} libraries.
• Staking Rewards Collectorstars28 - A script to parse and output staking rewards for a given Kusama or Polkadot address and cross-reference them with daily price data.
• Megaclitestars0 - Zero-knowledge tools for the Polkadot ecosystem.
• Europastars37 - A sandbox for the Substrate runtime execution environment.
• Jupiterstars31 - Testnet for smart contracts written for the FRAME Contracts pallet.
• Hydrastars22 - A GraphQL framework for Substrate nodes with a hosted playground. Check out the great docs.
• Proxy Hot Wallet Demostars10 - A demonstration of a secure, convenient, and flexible hot wallet architecture built on Substrate primitives.
• Substrate Faucet Botstars2 - Python-based faucet for development purposes.
• Parity Events - Upcoming events.
• Weights & Benchmarking
• Runtime Upgrades & Storage Migrations
• Substrate Migrationsstars10 - A list of past runtime storage migrations with notes and examples.
• subport - Support repository.
• DotJobs - A job board for the Polkadot ecosystem from the team at Stateless.Money.
• Redspotstars25 - A Truffle-like toolkit for smart contracts for the FRAME Contracts pallet.
• Gantree Librarystars11 - A suite of technologies for managing Substrate-powered parachain networks via rapid spin-up & tear-down.
• offchain::ipfs - Substrate infused with IPFS.
• Halvastars30 - A toolchain for improving the experience of developing on Substrate.
• Substrate Docker Buildersstars8 - A set of Dockerfiles and GitHub Actions to auto-build and push a Docker image for Substrate-based chains.
• Polkassembly - The place to discuss and vote on Kusama and Polkadot governance.
• Polkadot Network Technical Explainers
• Sub0 Developer Conference
• DOTspot - An open-place for Substrate ecosystem projects to share their latest news.
• FRAME Benchmarking - The official benchmarking framework for the FRAME system for runtime development.
• sup - Command line tool for generating or upgrading a Substrate node.
• Substrate Dev Hub Utilsstars3 - Unofficial utilities for working with official Substrate Developer Hub resources.
• Subscan - Multi-network explorer for Substrate-based chains.
• Kagome - A C++17 implementation of the Polkadot client; from Soramitsu.
• LimeChain AssemblyScript Runtimestars10 - An account-based Substrate proof-of-concept runtime written in AssemblyScript; from LimeChain.
• Codec Definition - Official codec documentation.
• Parity SCALE Codecstars116 - Reference implementation written in Rust.
• AssemblyScriptstars12 - Maintained by LimeChain.
• TypeScript - Maintained by Polkadot-JS.
• Gostars18 - Maintained by Itering.
• C++ - Maintained by Soramitsu.
• Haskell - Maintained by Robonomics Network.
• Java - Maintained by Emerald.
• Rubystars12 - Maintained by Itering.
• Pythonstars24 - Maintained by Polkascan Foundation.
• Build Substrate in a few minutes at a low cost - Guide to using cargo remote and Google Cloud to reduce Substrate build times; written by Substrate community member Matej Nemček.

• Developer Hub - Developer portal.
    • Tutorials - Guided exercises to get you started.
    • Knowledge Base - In-depth documentation related to Substrate development.
    • Recipes - Working code examples that solve common problems.
    • Reference Docs - Rustdoc API documentation.
• Builders Program - White-glove support for visionary teams.
• Web3 Foundation Grants - Funding for ecosystem development.
• Users - Teams building with Substrate.
• GitHubstars4.5k - Substrate source code.
• Developer Hub GitHub - Developer Hub repositories.
• Parity Blog - Read about updates in the Substrate ecosystem.
• Twitter - Follow us to stay up-to-date.
• Cumulus Wokshop - Build a parachain with Cumulus.
• DotLeap - Community content and newsletter.
• Reddit - Official subreddit.
• Polkadot Stack - Another awesome list maintained by our friends at Web3 Foundation.
• Subsocial - Decentralized social network for the Polkadot / Kusama ecosystem. Built on Substrate + IPFS.
• ink!stars482 - Smart contract language for Substrate chains.
• Cumulusstars270 - Simplified Polkadot-compatible parachains.
• Polkadot-JS - Rich framework for front-end development.
• Nodestars270 - A fresh FRAME-based node, ready for hacking.
• Open Runtime Module Library (ORML)stars158 - Community maintained collection of Substrate runtime modules.
• Sunshine Bounty - Distributed autonomous organization (DAO) for administering a bounty program.
• Sunshine Identity - Keybase-inspired identity management.
• Sunshine Faucet - Dispense resources for a development chain.
• subxt - Official Rust client.
• Polkadot-JS APIstars259 - Semi-official JavaScript library for Substrate-based chains.
• Substrate .Net APIstars11 - Maintained by Usetech.
• Archivestars91 - Indexing engine for Substrate chains.
• Polkascan - Multi-chain block explorer maintained by Polkascan Foundation.
• VSCode Substrate - Official plugin for Visual Studio Code.
• SubstraTEE - Trusted off-chain execution framework that uses Intel SGX trusted execution environments.

• Substrate debug-kitstars64 - A collection of tools and libraries for debugging Substrate-based chains, including offline-election, which is a tool that is used to predict nominated proof-of-stake elections.
• Seminar - Collaborative learning on Crowdcast.
• Technical Chat - Ask questions & chat with other Substrate developers.
• Polkadot GitHubstars3.3k - Substrate monorepo for multiple Parity-sponsored chains.
• Parachains, Cumulus & the Rococo Test Network
• Enterprise Demo
• Bridges & Cross-Chain Interoperability
• Archive Indexing Engine
• Ethereum Apps on Substrate Chains
• UTXO Workshopstars96 - Use Substrate to implement a Bitcoin-like chain.
• Enterprise Samplestars46 - A fully-featured sample that uses a supply chain use case to demonstrate Substrate's rich set of capabilities.
• Stack Overflow - Questions tagged substrate.
• FRAME - An idiomatic system for building Substrate runtimes.
• Bridgesstars99 - A collection of tools for cross-chain communication.
• Frontierstars160 - End-to-end Ethereum emulation for Substrate chains.
• Palletstars16 - Easily create pluggable blockchain capabilities.
• Parachainstars62 - A new Cumulus-based Substrate node, ready for hacking (see 'Cumulus' under Frameworks for more info).
• Front-Endstars102 - Use the Polkadot-JS API and React to build front-ends for Substrate-based chains.
• Commoditiesstars48 - Defines and implements a non-fungible token interface.
• Substrate API Clientstars94 - Rust client maintained by Supercomputing Systems AG.
• Python Substrate Interfacestars66 - Maintained by Polkascan Foundation.
• Go Substrate RPC Clientstars72 - Maintained by Centrifuge.
• Substrate C++ APIstars14 - Maintained by Usetech.
• Polkadot-JS Apps UI - Semi-official block explorer & front-end for Substrate-based chains.
• Polkadot-JS Extensionstars169 - Browser extension for interacting with Substrate-based chains.
• Sidecarstars88 - REST service that runs alongside Substrate nodes.
• TxWrapperstars48 - Helpful library for offline transaction creation.
• Subkey - Command line utility for working with cryptographic keys.
• Parity Signer - Upcycle an unused mobile phone into an air-gapped hardware wallet.
• Fork Off Substratestars28 - Script to help bootstrap a new chain with the state of a running chain.
